caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt with a red bow tie, glasses, and large black headphones. He wears a tall, grey, textured wig that stands upright. He is positioned behind a black microphone on a boom arm. In the background, walls are decorated with framed photographs and clothing displays, including a garment with the word "LEE" visible. To the left and right of the man, red and white logos appear on screen, including the text "PODCAST" and "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man is speaking, his mouth opening and closing as he communicates. His posture remains relatively steady, though there are slight shifts in his head position and facial expressions as he talks. The background and equipment remain static throughout the scene.
